run_structure.description: A game run consists of selecting a squad, choosing 2-4 corporate islands to liberate, then fighting the final battle on the Volcanic Hive.

missions_per_island.notes: Choose 4 of 8 available regions to play. Remaining 3 are overrun. Last is the boss mission at Corporate HQ.

run_structure.progression: Complete chosen islands -> Final Mission at Volcanic Hive -> Victory or Time Travel
run_structure.between_missions: Mechs fully repair between missions. Pilot XP and equipment persist.
run_structure.between_islands: Visit the shop to spend Reputation on weapons, pilots, reactor cores, or grid power.

islands.name: Archive, Inc.
islands.description: Archive Inc. recreates Old Earth as it was before the oceans rose. Features diverse natural terrain including forests, mountains, and water bodies.

environmental_hazards.name: Tidal Waves
environmental_hazards.effect: Periodically floods tiles from one edge of the map, converting them to water. Kills ground units on affected tiles.
environmental_hazards.timing: Triggers every few turns from a specified map edge

environmental_hazards.name: Air Strikes
environmental_hazards.effect: NPC artillery strikes telegraphed tiles for damage
environmental_hazards.timing: Telegraphed 1 turn in advance like Vek attacks

environmental_hazards.name: Dam
environmental_hazards.effect: Destructible structure. When destroyed, floods tiles behind it with water.

islands.boss: Varies — one of the Leader Vek types
islands.reputation_missions: 2-star and 1-star missions available. Higher star = more bonus objectives.
islands.notes: Good starting island. Tidal waves and water provide easy environmental kills.

islands.name: R.S.T. Corporation
islands.description: R.S.T. Corporation are terraforming specialists who turned the environment against the Vek. Desert terrain with sand, chasms, and extreme weather.

environmental_hazards.name: Lightning Storms
environmental_hazards.effect: Lightning strikes random tiles, dealing damage to units on them

environmental_hazards.name: Sand Storms
environmental_hazards.effect: Creates smoke on sand tiles when attacked
environmental_hazards.timing: Reactive — triggers when sand tiles are hit

environmental_hazards.name: Chasms
environmental_hazards.effect: Natural pits that instantly kill non-flying units pushed in

islands.notes: Chasms provide instant kills. Sand creates useful smoke. Lightning adds chaos.

islands.name: Pinnacle Robotics
islands.theme: Ice/technology — fighting Vek AND rogue AI
islands.description: Pinnacle Robotics fights on two fronts: Vek and their own sentient weapons (Bots). Features ice terrain and high-tech hazards.

environmental_hazards.name: Rogue Bots
environmental_hazards.effect: Sentient AI enemies that fight alongside Vek. 1 HP but dangerous attacks with fire.

environmental_hazards.name: Satellite Launches
environmental_hazards.effect: Satellite on launchpad fires when conditions are met, dealing damage in area
environmental_hazards.timing: Protect the satellite — it helps you. Smoke on pad prevents launch.

environmental_hazards.name: Freeze Mines
environmental_hazards.effect: Mines on tiles that freeze units stepping on them

environmental_hazards.name: Teleporters
environmental_hazards.effect: Paired pads that teleport units pushed onto them to the partner pad

islands.notes: Bots add complexity. Ice tiles can be cracked into water for kills. Teleporters enable creative positioning.

islands.name: Detritus Disposal
islands.description: Detritus tech breaks down matter into base elements. Factory-cities devoted to waste removal. A.C.I.D. everywhere.

environmental_hazards.name: A.C.I.D. Pools
environmental_hazards.effect: Tiles that apply A.C.I.D. status to any unit entering them (doubles damage taken)

environmental_hazards.name: Conveyor Belts
environmental_hazards.effect: Move all units on them 1 tile in belt direction at end of turn

environmental_hazards.name: Earth Movers
environmental_hazards.effect: Large NPC vehicles that move across the map, pushing/destroying things in their path

environmental_hazards.name: A.C.I.D. Launcher
environmental_hazards.effect: NPC artillery that shoots A.C.I.D. at targeted tiles

islands.notes: A.C.I.D. pools enable massive damage combos. Conveyor belts add positioning complexity. Good for 'Overkill' achievement.

islands.name: Volcanic Hive
islands.description: The final battle takes place in the Volcanic Hive, the source of the Vek. Two-phase mission.

phase_1.name: Surface Battle
phase_1.description: Fight on the volcanic surface. No grid buildings to protect.
phase_1.special: Super Volcano in corner alternates between Lava Flow (converts tiles to lava) and Volcanic Projectiles (instant kill + fire on impact tile).

phase_2.name: Underground Battle
phase_2.description: Fight underground in the Vek hive. Protect the Renfield Bomb.
phase_2.special: Renfield Bomb deploys in center. Has 4 HP. If destroyed, replacement deploys after 2-turn penalty. Must survive until bomb arms.
phase_2.objective: Protect Renfield Bomb for 5 turns until it detonates, destroying the hive.
notes: Renfield Bomb is immune to fire
If bomb is destroyed, replacement deploys but victory timer extends by 2 turns
Psion Tyrant appears here (1 damage to all mechs per turn)
Mountains appear as stalagmites — can block movement
Disabled mechs are restored between Phase 1 and Phase 2

standard_battle.description: Survive a set number of turns while protecting buildings from Vek.

bonus_objectives.description: Optional objectives that reward Reputation, Grid Power, or Reactor Cores.

difficulty_tiers.1_objective: Easier mission. Defensive shields placed on random buildings. Reward: 1 power/reputation.
difficulty_tiers.2_objectives: Medium mission. No shields. Two objectives, each giving 1 power/reputation/core.
difficulty_tiers.3_objectives: Harder mission. Three objectives with mixed rewards.

time_pods.description: Random special objective. A Time Pod appears on the map.
time_pods.reward: Always gives a Reactor Core. Chance of weapon, passive, or pilot.
time_pods.protection: Must either collect it with a mech or protect it until end of mission.
time_pods.notes: Required for 'Loot Boxes!' and 'Distant Friends' achievements.

shop.description: Between islands, visit the shop to spend Reputation earned from bonus objectives.

items.description: Random weapon to equip on a mech
Add reactor core to a mech

shop.notes: Shop inventory is random. Prioritize Grid Power if low, then Reactor Cores for key upgrades.

perfect_island.description: Complete an island with all bonus objectives fulfilled and no battles lost.
perfect_island.notes: Required for 'Perfect Strategy' achievement (10 perfect islands across all games).
